title: Types of angles by measure
description: Relate acute, obtuse, right, and straight angles to angle measures in degrees.
topic_path: Module 4: Angle measure and plane figures

assessment_items.question_content:
$ŌłĀ ABC$ measures $135^\circ$. 

**What type of angle is it?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

###Obtuse angle

An obtuse angle is an angle that is greater than $90^\circ$ but less than $180^\circ$.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

###Right angle

A right angle is an angle that measures exactly  $90^\circ$.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

###Straight angle

A straight angle is an angle that measures exactly $180^\circ$.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

$135^\circ$ is between $90^\circ$ and $180^\circ$, so $ŌłĀ ABC$  is an **obtuse** angle.

assessment_items.question_content:
$ŌłĀ MNO$ is an acute angle.

**Which of the following could be its measure?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[Ōśā image 1]]
Which of the angles are between $0^\circ$ and $90^\circ$?
$29^\circ$ could be the measure of $ŌłĀ MNO$.
